items.title: This 8-port 252W LCD-equipped SABRENT VOLTIK charging station can charge up 8 devices, and it’s just $63 today
items.summary: Over at Amazon, you’ll find the SABRENT VOLTIK 8-port 252W charging station currently down at $63.15 shipped via the Store4PC storefront. Also, be sure to enter promo code JK4T2ELP during checkout to see the discounted price. This is regularly a $90 charging unit, which is now seeing a 30% discount with the promo code. Today’s deal takes $27 off its usual going rate to land it even below the $70 price it recently hit during the Prime Day sale. While we’ve seen the standard 6-port and even the 10-port variants of this charger without the display go for less, this particular one with an LCD to give you all the charging stats has not dropped this low before. Head below for more details.

You’re looking at offers on a wide selection of gaming peripherals, including keyboards, mice, headsets, and more. The prices for the gear included in the sale start at just $9.99 Prime shipped, with discounts reaching as high as 74% off. You can also use the code WOOTGAMING at checkout to save an additional $5, while new customers can get $10 off. Many of the items in the sale are still fetching their full prices at Amazon, so it’s worth checking Woot before picking up any new Razer gear right now.

Sometimes two is better than one and, while I prefer to keep the Nomad ChargeKey on my keychain for this reason in a pinch, this Anker solution is a bit more practical in proper workstation and travel situations. Love the braided vibe here, not to mention the up to 140W power passthrough, but also the adjustable lengths via the onboard cable slider.
